{{Infobox location
| name = Fractured Realms
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Fractured Realms]] is a realm containing an [[Archmage’s Tower]].}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Fractured Realms]] is a collection of worlds.}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
